---
title: "CV"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Download

A PDF version is available: [Download CV (PDF)](files/cv.pdf)
:::

## Education

- **Ph.D. in [Field]** — [University], [Year]
  - Dissertation: *[Title]*
  - Advisor: [Name]

- **M.Sc. / B.Sc. in [Field]** — [University], [Year]

## Academic positions

- **[Role]** — [Institution / Lab], [Start] – [End or Present]

## Awards & fellowships

- [Award name], [Year]
- [Fellowship or grant], [Year]

## Teaching

- **[Course code / name]** — [Role: instructor / TA], [Term, Year]
- **[Course]** — [Term, Year]

## Service

- **Reviewer:** [Journals / conferences]
- **Organizing:** [Workshops, committees]

## Skills

- **Languages:** [e.g. English (native), French (working)]
- **Programming:** Python, R, [others]
- **Other:** [Lab techniques, statistical methods, etc.]

*For full details, see the [PDF CV](files/cv.pdf).*
